calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lucinda Lee for Kurt Trutner.

The Court expressed concern regarding the request for extraordinary fees, the Attorney rate of $700.00 per hour and the Paralegal rate of $325.00 per hour. The Court also noted that the Paralegal charged $200.00 per hour for her services and stated that the $700.00 per hour Attorney rate is not an acceptable amount in this Court. Ms. Lee spoke of her level of expertise to support her hourly rate, stated that there was a $1,300,000.00 overage that they were able to generate upon sale of the properties that were in disarray, and that she knew how to counsel her Client, select a team for staging and marketing, and select a Realtor. Ms. Lee also stated that she is a sole practitioner and needs to hire independent contractors (Paralegals), that the Paralegal she hired has over forty years of experience, that she (Ms. Lee) is not your ordinary Lawyer, and that if she did the work herself, fees would have gone up by $52,000.00. In addition, Ms. Lee stated that there is a $10,000.00 between what is being billed by her and what she billed the Estate, that her overhead includes malpractice premiums, that some entries are for no charge, that there are no double time entries for conversations between her and the Paralegal, and that she allowed the Paralegal to bill for the conversations. The First and Final Account, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
